ksa_text: Knowledge of AI and machine learning-specific model risk considerations, including data drift, concept drift, black-box explainability requirements, model instability, and how traditional model risk frameworks must adapt for non-parametric, ensemble, deep learning, and foundation models.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

onet.top_element_label: Evaluating Information to Determine Compliance with Standards

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-K-008 (AG, Knowledge) maps to Geospatial Data Analyst scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5494 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.549, nist_ai_rmf=0.505, nice=0.410. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within geospatial data analysis, GIS, and location intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5494 for weak fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AG-K-008 (AG, composite 0.5494) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.5494 with signal across eu_ai_act=0.549, nist_ai_rmf=0.505, nice=0.410 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AG-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Geospatial Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5494, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
